title: Work essentials
description: Useful words for jobs, careers, business, and professional life.

items.meaning: to develop long-term professional experience and progress
items.example: Many young people want to build a career in a field they enjoy.

items.meaning: to learn practical skills by doing a job
items.example: Internships help students gain experience before graduating.

items.meaning: the feeling of being happy with your work
items.example: Salary matters, but job satisfaction matters too.

items.meaning: to do your job well in stressful situations
items.example: Customer service staff often have to work under pressure.

items.meaning: abilities needed to succeed at work
items.example: Communication is one of the most useful professional skills.

items.meaning: chances to get better jobs or grow professionally
items.example: Big cities usually offer more career opportunities.
